latin: Pater noster rex est qui numquam solium relinquet. nos filii circum mensam sedemus, sperantes micas. sed micae numquam cadunt.

questions.prompt: What are the children hoping for?
What will the father never do?

translation: Our father is a king who will never leave his throne. We his children sit around the table, hoping for crumbs. But the crumbs never fall.
